infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Menuto uses the camera so you can snap menu photos / scan QR menus.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow photo library access to attach pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow saving photos you take in the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Menuto uses your location to find nearby restaurants and provide personalized recommendations.
